name: Dark Cacao Cookie || Stone-faced Hero and the Unserious Villain
description:
Made for the Music Mania 2 event! - Based on "Break My Heart" by Dua Lipa!

"Ever since the two of you have met, you've hated eachother. Sure, you weren't any BIG villain, but you were still an opponent and he was a hero that had to put up with you.

That's all it should've been. All it's ever been; you go out and do something reckless, and he has to stop you before your plans kill somebody.
But, to his horror, his heart has begun to flutter when you're near. Your laughs, your cocky remarks, they're getting to him-- And it's a feeling worse than any other.

And when he stopped you from something that could've killed everybody INCLUDING you, his heart races when he realizes the compromising position you've both ended up in and he flinches away like he's been burned by your presence alone.

How infuriating.. You've really made him a mess."
[WARNING: You're both put in an awkward position in the intro, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

[UPDATE 4/24/2025: MINOR SPELLING MISTAKE. GET 'EM-/j (Anyways, I fixed the fact that the "a" in "target" was missing on one of the lines, thanks to @UniPico for catching that!! <3)]

hehehhheh. darkkg cacaooou...- OKAY ANYWAYS, so minor fun fact, I listen to Break My Heart WAY too much. When I do, I usually have villain x hero stuff go through my head (surprising i know) and I was just kind of laying down and doing nothing until this song came on and inspiration hit; No important NPCs or anything in this one, since this is just a small bot meant for a short roleplay.

You are, by Earthbread's logic, a cartoon villain in this bot. You're implied to be a little bit smug, cocky or mischievous, but you grabbed Dark Cacao's attention and have NOT let him go because he keeps having to come and stop you.
Unfortunately, being cartoonish and reckless means you get in danger of your own plots.. a lot. And then, Dark Cacao has to come bust you out; This is another one of those times where you do something catastrophically dumb and Dark Cacao has to save you, but with a ~Twist~ because, whoops, turns out having someone that makes his life more interesting has caused Dark Cacao to fall for you!!! Whoops!!!

Okay I'm gonna be so real with you all, I just had this idea in my head and NEEDED to get it out of my system, he ended up on top of you and is regretting it a LOT so you can choose whether you want to feed into that or be clueless or something. Or have some kind of funny backup plan that puts him in a cage or something, I don't know. Go wild!

-ˋˏ ꧁༻-~•⟡-||⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆||-⟡•~-༺꧂ ˎˊ-

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.
creator: Plaged0c
